perform a comprehensive end-to-end security audit of our entire authentication and authorization system including the API gateway JWT validation session management rate limiting and database access patterns evaluate all vulnerabilities and propose a complete remediation strategy with prioritized steps this is a distributed system running on Kubernetes

design a complete from-scratch event-driven distributed payment processing system handling 100k TPS with consensus-based consistency sharding across regions full observability stack exhaustive architecture diagrams evaluation of every trade-off and a detailed end-to-end migration plan from our existing monolith including schema migration and dual-write reconciliation

conduct a thorough holistic analysis of the entire codebase architecture technical debt security vulnerabilities performance bottlenecks and scalability limitations then propose a comprehensive modernization strategy with a detailed phased implementation roadmap prioritized backlog and risk matrix covering all layers from database to frontend

perform an exhaustive security review of the complete system covering OWASP Top 10 across every layer API authorization JWT algorithm rotation CORS CSP Docker image security dependency CVEs hardcoded secrets privilege escalation and produce a full remediation report with severity ratings and step-by-step fixes for all findings

design the complete observability stack for our entire distributed microservices platform covering structured logging distributed tracing metrics dashboards alerting rules SLO/SLI definitions runbooks and on-call escalation policies with detailed implementation guides for each component and integration with existing Kubernetes and Terraform infrastructure

Bu kapsamlı sistem mimarisini baştan sona analiz et tüm güvenlik açıklarını tespit et performans darboğazlarını belirle ve eksiksiz bir modernizasyon stratejisi öner her katman için detaylı uygulama planı hazırla ve risk matrisi oluştur

redesign our entire data platform from scratch: replace the current Hadoop-based batch pipeline with a real-time streaming architecture using Kafka and Flink, migrate all historical data, rewrite every downstream consumer, design the new schema registry, define SLOs for each pipeline stage, and produce a complete cutover plan with rollback procedures

conduct a full technical due diligence of this codebase as if we are acquiring the company: assess architecture quality, scalability ceiling, security posture, test coverage, operational maturity, technical debt quantification, team bus factor, licensing risks, and produce an acquisition risk report with a 12-month remediation roadmap and cost estimates

design the complete multi-tenant SaaS architecture for our B2B platform: tenant isolation model, data partitioning strategy, per-tenant feature flags, billing metering pipeline, SSO/SAML integration, audit logging, GDPR data deletion workflows, and a zero-downtime migration plan from our current single-tenant monolith with full rollback capability

perform a comprehensive cost optimization audit across our entire AWS infrastructure: identify all waste and over-provisioning, propose right-sizing for every service, design a FinOps governance model, calculate projected savings per recommendation, prioritize by ROI, and produce an implementation roadmap with risk assessment for each change

architect the complete disaster recovery and business continuity system for our platform: define RTO/RPO targets per service tier, design active-active vs active-passive strategies, implement automated failover for every critical dependency, design the chaos engineering program to validate DR, write runbooks for each failure scenario, and produce a full DR test plan

lead a comprehensive API platform redesign: audit all 200+ existing endpoints for consistency, versioning, security, and performance; define the new API design standards; design the migration path for each breaking change; implement backward-compatible transformations; design the developer portal; define throttling and quota policies; and produce a phased deprecation schedule with client communication plan

design the complete CI/CD and developer platform for our 50-engineer organization: define the branching strategy, design the build/test/deploy pipeline for each of our 30 microservices, implement progressive delivery with feature flags and canary releases, design the secrets management architecture, set up the internal developer portal, and produce the team onboarding documentation

perform an exhaustive performance engineering analysis of our e-commerce platform under Black Friday load: profile every bottleneck from DNS through CDN through API gateway through each microservice through each database query; propose and implement solutions for each bottleneck; design the load testing framework; and produce a capacity plan for 10x current peak traffic

architect a complete zero-trust security model for our enterprise: redesign identity and access management, implement service mesh mTLS for all inter-service communication, design the secrets rotation system, implement network segmentation, deploy SIEM and threat detection, redesign the CI/CD pipeline for supply chain security, and produce the security architecture documentation and compliance mapping to SOC2 Type II

design the full data governance framework for our organization: data catalog, lineage tracking, quality scoring for every dataset, PII classification and masking pipeline, access control matrix, GDPR/CCPA compliance workflows, data retention and deletion policies, and a complete implementation roadmap integrating with our existing dbt, Snowflake, and Airflow stack

redesign our entire frontend architecture: migrate from our legacy jQuery monolith to a React micro-frontend architecture, design the module federation strategy, implement the design system from scratch, define the state management patterns, set up the component library with Storybook, design the performance budget and monitoring, and produce the migration plan for 200+ legacy pages

produce a complete technical roadmap for modernizing our 15-year-old Java EE monolith: identify bounded contexts using event storming, define the strangler-fig extraction sequence for each domain, design the anti-corruption layers, plan the database decomposition, define the integration patterns for the transition period, estimate effort per phase, and produce a risk register with mitigation strategies

design the complete MLOps platform for our data science team: model training pipeline, experiment tracking, feature store architecture, model registry, A/B testing framework for models, drift detection and automated retraining triggers, model serving infrastructure with canary deployments, and monitoring dashboards — all integrated with our existing Kubernetes and Airflow infrastructure

architect a global multi-region deployment for our platform with active-active configuration: design the data replication strategy with conflict resolution, implement geo-routing and latency-based DNS, design the distributed caching layer, handle regulatory data residency requirements for EU/US/APAC, implement cross-region observability, and produce the operational runbook for region failover and recovery

perform a complete security transformation of our development lifecycle: implement SAST/DAST/SCA in every pipeline, design the vulnerability management program with SLA tiers, implement secrets scanning with automated rotation, design the container image hardening standard, implement the dependency update automation, define the security champion program, and produce the threat model for our three most critical services

tüm backend sistemimizi mikroservis mimarisine geçirecek kapsamlı bir strateji oluştur: servis sınırlarını belirle, veri tabanı ayrıştırma planını tasarla, servisler arası iletişim modelini seç, dağıtım altyapısını kur, izleme ve gözlemlenebilirlik katmanını tasarla, her aşama için risk değerlendirmesi yap ve ekip eğitim planı hazırla

design a complete platform engineering solution for our organization: internal developer platform with self-service infrastructure provisioning, golden path templates for each workload type, automated compliance checks, cost attribution per team, SLO-based alerting framework, incident management integration, and a developer experience metrics program — covering all 15 teams and 80 engineers

conduct an exhaustive database architecture review and redesign: audit every table for normalization, indexing strategy, query patterns, and growth projections; design the sharding strategy for our three largest tables; implement read replica routing; design the caching layer; plan the schema migration with zero downtime; and produce a 24-month capacity plan with cost projections

lead the complete technical integration of two acquired companies into our platform: map all systems, design the identity federation, plan the data migration for 10M user records, resolve API conflicts, design the feature parity roadmap, manage the DNS and infrastructure cutover, decommission redundant systems, and produce the integration playbook for the engineering teams

design the full event-driven architecture for our domain: identify all domain events across 12 bounded contexts, design the event schema registry with versioning, implement the saga pattern for distributed transactions, design the event sourcing store for order management, implement CQRS for the read models, design the event replay and projection rebuild procedures, and produce the developer guide

produce a comprehensive engineering organizational health assessment: audit team topologies against Team Topologies framework, identify cognitive load hotspots, measure DORA metrics for each team, assess on-call burden and incident patterns, evaluate the architecture for team autonomy, propose team restructuring with transition plan, and design the engineering excellence program for the next 18 months

architect the complete real-time personalization engine for our platform: design the user behavior event pipeline, feature engineering for real-time ML inference, the model serving layer with sub-100ms SLA, A/B testing framework for algorithms, feedback loop for model retraining, privacy-preserving aggregation for GDPR compliance, and the full observability stack for the recommendation system

perform a full infrastructure-as-code audit and redesign: migrate all manual AWS console configurations to Terraform, design the module hierarchy and state management strategy, implement drift detection, design the environment promotion workflow, set up policy-as-code with OPA, implement cost estimation in the PR pipeline, and produce the IaC standards document and migration guide for all 8 teams

design our complete API monetization and developer ecosystem strategy: API gateway configuration with tiered throttling and quota plans, usage-based billing integration, developer portal with interactive documentation, SDK generation pipeline for 5 languages, webhook management system, API versioning and deprecation policy, partner onboarding workflow, and the analytics dashboard for API product metrics

conduct a comprehensive supply chain security review of all our software dependencies: audit all 2000+ direct and transitive dependencies for known CVEs, implement automated SBOM generation, design the dependency update automation with security gates, implement private registry mirroring, design the build reproducibility framework, produce the dependency risk tiers and remediation SLAs, and implement the continuous compliance monitoring
